title: UK REACH authorisation for Chemetall Limited, 12 June 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance name   4-Nonylphenol, branched and linear, ethoxylated (4-NPnEO)  Authorised use   Mixing, by Aerospace companies and their associated supply chains, including the Authorisation Holder, of base polysulfide sealant components with 4-NPnEO containing hardener, resulting in mixtures containing < 0.1% w/w of 4-NPnEO for Aerospace uses.  Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number   Chemetall Limited (UKREACH/25/14/00)   Date of decision   12 June 2025 "
